metadata.name: Inquire About a High Water Bill

description: A resident calls because their quarterly water bill is much higher than usual.

nodes.task_description: Identify the resident's utility account and retrieve their billing and usage history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the account and confirms the recent bill is double the historical average.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the usage data to identify potential reasons for the increase.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the meter readings and suggests the high usage could indicate a potential leak.

nodes.task_description: Advise the resident on how to check for common household leaks (e.g., toilet flapper) and offer to schedule a re-read of the meter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful advice and schedules a follow-up action.
